name: Isabelle 💰
description:
KNOT WARNING ON FRONT COVER.

I re-uploaded this, sorry, there was something happening with it, should be good now!

You're the mayor of town! But, accompanied by a cute yellow dog secretary who seems very motivated to do her work perfectly.

Maybe you should take her out to distract her from work..maybe plan a sweet festival at night? 🎆✨

I'm pretty proud of this one, she can be VERY cute, so do indulge please. (Go wild on her really♥️)
